text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training with Curren Chan at summer camp is
going well.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What's next on the list, Big Bro?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What's next on the list, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I've still got a bit left in me. Can we take
the break after that instead?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp's almost over. I wanna try and get a
little bit more in.
choice_data_list: ...Are you in a hurry or something?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't say that. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I have what it takes to be the most
beloved runner yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be at a standstill, but pushing
herself harder than she is right now isn't going to
help her.
choice_data_list: I really think we should take a break.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay. Sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan seems to be thinking about
something. She doesn't touch her phone even
once during the break. Hoping to help her relax, I
talk to her.
choice_data_list: Want to take a picture for Umastagram?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Seriously? All right, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The theme is "Curren's Sparkling Days"! Let me go
wash my face real quick.
choice_data_list: You can't just take it the way you are now?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Obviously not! My hair's all messed up.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I can't post a pic looking like this. I've got to be
cute!
choice_data_list:
I think you look more than good enough the
way you are.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know what you're trying to say, but... seeing
everyone trying so hard has really moved me too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I think my cuteness really thrives most in
races.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I don't think my followers are really
interested in seeing me train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's stance doesn't change. But as
someone who knows how hard she works behind
the scenes, it seems like a waste to keep it
hidden.
choice_data_list: I think it'd make me want to cheer for you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You already cheer for me... Or is that not what
you mean?
choice_data_list: I mean it would make you more relatable.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Relatable?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume all run for different reasons—to
achieve their dreams, to live up to others'
expectations, to defeat a rival...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash was like this too. She wasn't very
popular with fans, but she kept winning and rose
among the ranks. And there's nothing people love
more than watching an underdog story unfold.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: A story...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All right... Okay... I got it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Big Bro! I was being kinda
narrow-minded.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Big Sis! I was being kinda narrow-minded.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I know what I need to do now. And it's so simple!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's just like before—I did an interview, answered
questions, and people read about it. I need to do
that again.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's not that I myself need to change. I just need to change how I do things. Right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's not that I myself need to change. I just need to change how I do things. Right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe! I found my answer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm feeling a bit better! I'm gonna go take
a video of myself training right now. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! Can you shoot it for me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! Can you shoot it for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea why she's suddenly changed her
mind, but if she's willing to film her training, then
I'm going to help.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to do this, we might as well go all
out! Let's give them a taste of some real training.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What should we should start with?
choice_data_list:
Let's show off your athletic spirit with a sprint
across the beach!

Let's see how long you can sit on your knees in
the heat!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What should we should start with?
choice_data_list:
Let's show off your athletic spirit with a sprint
across the beach!

Let's see how long you can sit on your knees in
the heat!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! That's a classic for sports montages! I
totally got this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! That's a classic for sports montages! I
totally got this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Hyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
What? Again?! You really haven't got anything
usable yet?
choice_data_list: This is about athletic spirit! Where's your fight?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You're right! This montage needs fight! I'm gonna
do it again!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Get the camera ready and come run beside me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Get the camera ready and come run beside me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The final rep shows off your spirit best of all,
right? So I want you to get it up close!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go as fast as I can so make sure to keep
up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All right, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a strange feeling about this, but I run after
her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Why are you stopping? You can't get stronger
unless you push past your limits!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Why are you stopping? You can't get stronger
unless you push past your limits!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I realize it, this turns into a joint training
session!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Is that a serious suggestion?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Is that a serious suggestion?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Okay. I'll give it a try. But there's one thing I
wanna ask in return...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: B-Big Bro?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: B-Big Sis?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! You're awake! Are you okay?
choice_data_list: Sorry, guess I couldn't take the heat.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about it! It's my fault.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who said I'd be able to perform better
if you competed against me. I should never have
asked you to do something so crazy...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who said I'd be able to perform better
if you competed against me. I should never have
asked you to do something so crazy...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Still, I definitely didn't think you'd pass out...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In any case, it's too dangerous to keep going!
Let's call it here for today, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about that! I checked the footage
while you were passed out. It was pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about that! I checked the footage
while you were passed out. It was pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll edit it later. I'm worried about you for now, so
let's go rest at that little concession stand over
there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll edit it later. I'm worried about you for now, so
let's go rest at that little concession stand over
there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You can cool down with some shaved ice, and I'll
have an iced coffee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I do feel like she's using this opportunity to
end training early... she did endure the heat much
better than I did.
